name: digitalkhalane
description: > **Created by Harshal Parmeshvar Patil**   > Official digital platform for the **Khalane Yatra Utsav** festival — built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js).

scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
